author: Edouard
content:
Feed is one of our favourite places to go for a grub. Usually it is bacon egg and cheese (all melted 🤤) but today I went for the Philly Steak sandwich and oh my what a beautie!!!!
It is exactly what I love in a dirty sandwich...
Didn’t have time to take a picture though!
Oh and they Yallah coffee is the best
